trade_plans.time_window: enter within 4-8h if resistance tested, hold 12-24h
trade_plans.entry_trigger: Price enters $0.039-$0.040 zone and shows rejection (e.g., 1h candle close below $0.04 after testing it, or bearish divergence on lower timeframes)
trade_plans.invalidation: Price closes 1h above $0.041, or current price drops significantly below $0.039 before entry
confluence_signals: Extreme long crowd in L/S ratio (97th percentile)
Price rising with LOW volume (weak buying)
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Four aligned bearish signals (extreme L/S ratio, weak volume, resistance, MACD divergence) contribute to a 68% win rate. The extreme long positioning is a strong contrarian indicator, reinforced by price-volume divergence at key resistance.
